title: egr Cooler Delete 1.9tdi for A3 A4 A6 Golf T5, EGR Delete Removal Replacement Kit 57 mm for ASZ, ARL, BLT, BKC, BXE, BJB, BXF, BSW, BUK, BPX, AXC, AXB, AUY, BVK, BTB, AVF, AWX
features: Wide Compatibility - Replaces original part numbers (OEM): 038131501AT / 038131501T / 038131501AB, fits many popular TDI engines.
Ideal for Golf, Polo, Passat, Leon, Octavia and more. Works with ASZ, ARL, BLT, BKC, BXE, BJB, BXF, BSW, BUK, BPX, AXC, AXB, AUY, BVK, BTB, AVF, AWX from ASZ, BKC, BXE etc.
Made of high-strength aluminium alloy - made of robust materials for optimal durability and long service life.
Reinforced weld for maximum reliability - a solid and precise construction guarantees increased resistance to mechanical stress.
description: Product Description Applicable models Golf Mk4, Bora ASZ 130, ARL 150 Golf Mk5, Golf Mk5 Plus BXF 90, BKC / BXE 105 Polo ASZ 130 / BLT 130 Caddy BJB 105 Passat, Jetta BKC / BXE 105 Transporter T5 AXC 85 & AXB 105 Sharan, Alhambra AUY / BVK 115, ASZ 130 & BTB 150 Octavia BKC / BXE / BJB 105, ASZ 130 Fabia BSW / 105, ASZ / BLT 130 Applicable models Roomster BSW 105 Superb, A4, A6 AVF / AWX 130 Ibiza ASZ / BLT 130, BUK / BPX 160 Leon BXF 90, BKC / BXE 105, ASZ 130, ARL 150 Toledo BKC / BJB / BXE 105, ASZ 130, ARL 150 Altea BKC / BXE / BJB 105 A3 8L ASZ 130 A3 8P BKC / BXE / 105 Wide Compatibility Replaces original part numbers (OEM): 038131501AT / 038131501T / 038131501AB, fits many popular TDI engines. Made of high-strength aluminium alloy made of robust materials for optimal durability and long service life.
